name: chatgpt-sidecar
description: A themed Windows ChatGPT companion for Codex that offloads planning, debugging, and repository analysis to help preserve precious Codex token usage.

interface.shortDescription: Preserve Codex usage by offloading planning to ChatGPT
interface.longDescription: Sidecar is a native Windows companion app that lets the user drag an Attach handle onto the exact Codex desktop window, pins itself beside that window, hosts a persistent ChatGPT session, gathers bounded local Codex and repository context, and offloads planning, debugging, review, and repository analysis so valuable Codex turns can stay focused on implementation.
defaultPrompt: Explain how Sidecar can preserve Codex token usage.
